message:
fix(client): use PaneId instead of TabId for pane identifier fields

Correct type aliases in domain.rs, clientpane.rs, mousestate.rs, and
sessionhandler.rs where PaneId was semantically appropriate but TabId
was used. Both are u64 aliases so behavior is unchanged, but this
fixes type-level documentation and prevents future confusion.
Reformat long import lines in sessionhandler.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
